About the Business

Professional website development with clear communication and practical execution.

We focus on websites that look premium, load fast, work on every screen and explain your business clearly. Every project is planned with proper structure, clean UI, responsive layout and basic SEO setup.

Services

Clear services help customers understand exactly what they are paying for before they make a purchase or submit a project enquiry.

01

Business Websites

Professional websites for restaurants, shops, freelancers, agencies and local businesses.

  • Home, About, Services, Contact
  • Mobile-first responsive layout
  • Basic SEO and speed setup
02

Landing Pages

Focused pages built for offers, promotions, lead collection and service explanations.

  • Strong hero section
  • CTA buttons
  • Contact and enquiry flow
03

Website Redesign

Upgrade old websites into modern, clean and trust-building digital experiences.

  • Layout improvement
  • Better typography
  • Performance optimization
04

Portfolio Websites

Personal and professional portfolio websites for creators, students and service providers.

  • Profile section
  • Project showcase
  • Contact links
05

Maintenance

Ongoing updates, small fixes, text changes, image replacement and website checks.

  • Monthly support
  • Bug fixes
  • Content updates
06

Payment Page Setup

Website preparation and checkout-page support after payment gateway approval.

  • Policy links
  • Payment button placement
  • Order/enquiry flow

Pricing

Final price depends on pages, content, features, integrations and timeline. A written quotation is shared before work starts.

Starter

Landing Page

₹2,999 onwards

Best for a simple online presence or one service offer.

  • 1 page website
  • Responsive design
  • Basic contact links
  • Delivery: 3–5 working days
Popular

Business Website

₹6,999 onwards

Best for small businesses that need a complete website.

  • Up to 5 pages
  • Services and pricing sections
  • Contact/enquiry setup
  • Delivery: 5–10 working days
Custom

Premium Website

₹12,999 onwards

Best for brands that need custom sections, advanced design or extra features.

  • Custom page sections
  • Advanced animations
  • Basic payment-page support
  • Delivery: 10–20 working days
Process

A simple project flow from enquiry to launch.

Every project starts with a clear scope so the client knows what will be delivered, how long it will take and what support is included.

Project Discussion

We collect business details, goals, page requirements, style references and timeline.

Quotation & Confirmation

The price, features, delivery timeline and revision limits are confirmed before work begins.

Design & Development

The website is designed, developed and checked for mobile and desktop screens.

Delivery & Support

The final website is delivered through a live link or project files, with agreed correction support.

Need a clean website for your business?

Send your project details and get a clear quotation with price, timeline and deliverables.

Policy

Terms & Conditions

Last updated: 27 April 2026

1. Business Information

This website is operated by ALPHA.AI Web Developing, Legal Entity Name: Ansel Varghese, Location: Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India, Email: anselvarghese2@gmail.com, Phone: +91 7012745178.

2. Services

We provide website design, website development, landing page development, portfolio websites, business websites, redesign services, basic SEO setup and website maintenance services.

3. Project Scope

The project scope, price, timeline, revisions and deliverables will be confirmed before work begins. Extra features, pages, design changes or third-party integrations not included in the original scope may require additional charges.

4. Client Responsibilities

The client must provide correct business details, images, text, logo files, login access where required and timely feedback. Delays in content or approvals may delay delivery.

5. Payments

Payments may be collected as advance payment, milestone payment or final payment depending on the project. Work begins after agreed confirmation or advance payment is received.

6. Revisions

Revision limits will be mentioned in the quotation. Extra revisions outside the agreed scope may be charged separately.

7. Third-Party Services

Domain names, hosting, premium plugins, stock images, payment gateways, email tools and other third-party services may have separate charges, terms and availability controlled by their providers.

8. Intellectual Property

After full payment, final website files created specifically for the client will be delivered to the client, except third-party assets, templates, tools or licensed items with their own usage rules.

9. Limitation of Liability

We are not responsible for losses caused by incorrect client information, third-party downtime, hosting issues, payment gateway rejection, cyberattacks on third-party systems, or changes made by others after delivery.

10. Contact

For questions about these Terms, contact us at anselvarghese2@gmail.com or +91 7012745178.

Policy

Privacy Policy

Last updated: 27 April 2026

1. Overview

ALPHA.AI Web Developing, operated by Ansel Varghese, respects the privacy of clients and visitors. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use and protect information shared with us.

2. Information We Collect

We may collect name, business name, email address, phone number, project requirements, website content, logos, images and other details voluntarily provided by clients for project work.

3. How We Use Information

Information is used to communicate with clients, prepare quotations, design and develop websites, provide support, process project requests and improve our services.

4. Payment Information

Payments may be processed through third-party payment providers. We do not store card numbers, UPI PINs, net banking passwords or sensitive payment credentials on this website.

5. Sharing of Information

We do not sell personal information. Information may be shared only when required for service delivery, legal compliance, payment processing, hosting, domain setup, or tools required to complete the project.

6. Data Security

Reasonable steps are taken to protect client information. However, no internet-based system is completely risk-free, so clients should avoid sharing unnecessary sensitive information.

7. Data Retention

Project-related information may be retained for records, support and legal purposes unless deletion is requested and deletion is legally or operationally possible.

8. Contact

For privacy-related requests, contact anselvarghese2@gmail.com or +91 7012745178.

Policy

Refund & Cancellation Policy

Last updated: 27 April 2026

1. Cancellation Before Work Starts

If the client cancels before any project work has started, a refund may be provided after deducting payment gateway charges or administrative charges, if applicable.

2. Cancellation After Work Starts

If work has already started, the refund amount will depend on the work completed, time spent, resources used and third-party costs already paid. A full refund is not guaranteed after work begins.

3. No Refund After Final Delivery

After final website delivery, project approval or handover of files/access, payments are generally non-refundable.

4. Non-Refundable Items

Domain registration, hosting, premium themes, paid plugins, stock assets, third-party software, payment gateway fees and other external charges are non-refundable once purchased or activated.

5. Revisions Instead of Refunds

If there is a reasonable issue within the agreed project scope, we may provide corrections or revisions as per the agreed revision limit instead of issuing a refund.

6. Refund Timeline

Approved refunds will be processed within 5–7 working days. The actual credit time may depend on the bank or payment provider.

7. Contact

To request cancellation or refund support, contact anselvarghese2@gmail.com or +91 7012745178 with your project details and payment reference.

Policy

Service Delivery Policy

Last updated: 27 April 2026

1. Nature of Delivery

ALPHA.AI Web Developing provides digital website design and web development services. No physical product is shipped unless separately mentioned in writing.

2. Delivery Method

Completed work may be delivered through a live website link, downloadable project files, hosting access, GitHub repository, email attachment, Netlify deployment or another agreed digital method.

3. Estimated Timelines

  • Landing Page: 3–5 working days after receiving all required content.
  • Business Website: 5–10 working days after receiving all required content.
  • Premium or Custom Website: 10–20 working days, depending on project scope.

4. Client Content Requirement

Delivery time starts only after the client provides required text, images, logo, access details and project confirmation. Delay in client response may extend the delivery timeline.

5. Support After Delivery

Basic correction support may be provided within the agreed revision period. Ongoing maintenance is available as a separate paid service.

6. Contact

For delivery updates, contact anselvarghese2@gmail.com or +91 7012745178.
